# Group Revenue Distribution Guideline

## **Overview** <a href="#group-treasury.1" id="group-treasury.1"></a>

Both group owners and members can view **group funds** via the **Group Treasury menu**.

<figure><img src="../../.gitbook/assets/Group-Treasury-1.png" alt=""><figcaption></figcaption></figure>



## Manage payouts <a href="#manage-payouts.1" id="manage-payouts.1"></a>

If you are the **owner of a selected group**, you can use the **Manual Distribution** feature in the Group Treasury menu to **distribute group funds** to yourself or other group members.

<figure><img src="../../.gitbook/assets/Group-Treasury-2.png" alt=""><figcaption></figcaption></figure>



### Who can receive funds

* Group member for 14+ days
* Wallet registered
* Must be a current group member



## Revenue Distribution History <a href="#revenue-distribution-history.1" id="revenue-distribution-history.1"></a>

**Group owner** can view the full history of all distributions made within the group, while **group members** can only see records of distributions they have personally received.

<figure><img src="../../.gitbook/assets/Group-Treasury-3.png" alt=""><figcaption></figcaption></figure>
